tasks.title: SPEC: add sofar next to §CLI and a Next-actions acceptance block
Derivation: extend InitiativeListEntry with drift_events (freshness staleness signal) in core/listing + listing tests
Render + command: projections/templates/next.ts, cli/next.ts, register in cli/index.ts
Acceptance tests: next.test.ts — render shape, stale-suffix rules, warnings to stderr, empty record; full suite + typecheck green

payload.chose: sofar next as a read-side render over the existing listInitiatives derivation, extended with one additive field (drift_events, from FreshnessState) so each line can carry a ⚠ may-be-stale suffix; closed initiatives render whatever their final write-back recorded (no mechanical closed-state filtering); render lives in projections/templates/, uncapped terminal surface like sofar list
payload.over: a new fold/derivation; filtering 100%-done initiatives as "closed"; a bare render without the staleness signal; putting the render in src/cli/
payload.because: listInitiatives already computes next_action per initiative deterministically (zero new event types); a stale next action is exactly the failure mode a next-actions surface would silently amplify, so the drift signal is load-bearing, not decoration; initiative closure is a record convention, not an engine state — the record's own words render; templates/ is where renders live (rejected-approaches list already bars renders in src/cli/)

payload.cmd: git add docs/SPEC.md && git commit -m "1.1: SPEC — sofar next in §CLI + Next-actions acceptance block" --quiet && git log --oneline -1

npx vitest run packages/engine/test/listing.test.ts --reporter=dot 2>&1 | tail -8
git add packages/engine/src/core/listing.ts packages/engine/test/listing.test.ts && git commit -m "1.2: listing — drift_events freshness signal on InitiativeListEntry" --quiet && git log --oneline -1
npm run build >/dev/null 2>&1 && node packages/engine/dist/cli.js next

git add packages/engine/src/projections/templates/next.ts packages/engine/src/projections/templates/list.ts packages/engine/src/cli/next.ts packages/engine/src/cli/index.ts && git commit -m "1.3: sofar next — render template + CLI command" --quiet && git log --oneline -1
npx vitest run packages/engine/test/next.test.ts --reporter=dot 2>&1 | tail -6
npm test 2>&1 | tail -6; echo "=== typecheck ==="; npm run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -4
git add packages/engine/test/next.test.ts && git commit -m "1.4: next.test.ts — render shape, stale-suffix rules, stderr warnings, determinism" --quiet && git log --oneline -1
